message:
feat(mux): thread Cx through MuxPool to DirectMuxClient method calls

Complete the Cx propagation chain: MuxPool _with_cx methods now call
the corresponding DirectMuxClient _with_cx variants (connect_with_cx,
list_panes_with_cx, get_lines_with_cx, get_pane_render_changes_with_cx,
get_pane_render_changes_batch_with_cx, write_to_pane_with_cx,
send_paste_with_cx) instead of wrapping plain calls in cx::with_cx_async.

This enables structured async cancellation, observability, and resource
tracking through the full MuxPool → DirectMuxClient call chain.

Also updates Cargo.lock for GUI workspace member dependency resolution
(window, font, client, and related macOS/Linux/OpenGL crates).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
